source: Adam Cohen, 2026-04-24 (Re: Next steps — Exam Interpreter)
description: Subacute combined degeneration from B12 deficiency. Regression seed: the engine ranked B12 too low and missed the dorsal-column/corticospinal localization.

input.exam: memory loss, increased deep tendon reflexes, loss of vibration sense

transcript.text: What brings you in to see neurology today?
My memory's been slipping the last few months, and I feel unsteady on my feet, especially in the dark.
Have you noticed any numbness or tingling?
Yes, my feet feel numb and I can't really feel vibrations. My doctor said my reflexes were really brisk.
Any changes in your diet, or stomach problems?
I went mostly vegan a couple years ago and I take omeprazole for reflux.
